    B

    backlog - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    The maximum queue length; i.e. the maximum number of clients that can be waiting to connect.
    barChart - Variable in class Controllers.ReportController
     
    BaseDisplayController - Class in Controllers
    Abstract base controller for displaying reservations.
    BaseDisplayController() - Constructor for class Controllers.BaseDisplayController
     
    BaseReservationController - Class in Controllers
    Abstract base controller for reservation management.
    BaseReservationController() - Constructor for class Controllers.BaseReservationController
     
    bill - Variable in class util.PaymentResult
    The bill associated with this payment result, containing final costs and details.
    Bill - Class in Entities
    Represents a bill for a reservation.
    Bill(int, int, double) - Constructor for class Entities.Bill
    Constructor for creating a new bill.
    Bill(int, int, double, LocalDateTime, boolean) - Constructor for class Entities.Bill
    Constructor for creating a bill from database records.
    billDAO - Variable in class logicControllers.DailyFunctionController
     
    BillDAO - Class in DAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Bill entities in the database.
    BillDAO() - Constructor for class DAO.BillDAO
     
    billdb - Variable in class logicControllers.PaymentController
    Data access object for bill-related database operations.
    billID - Variable in class Entities.Bill
     
    billID - Variable in class Entities.Reservation
